@@ -102,7 +102,7 @@
 {"id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.1","title":"[Scan] Dockerfile extractor v1 syntax coverage","description":"# Task: Dockerfile extractor v1 syntax coverage

## Purpose
Define the first-pass syntax coverage for Dockerfile extraction so scope is explicit
and testable (multiline RUN, backslash continuations, shell vs exec form).

## Requirements
- Enumerate supported RUN forms (single-line, multiline with \\)
- Define quoting/escape handling expected in v1
- Note unsupported constructs explicitly

## Acceptance Criteria
- Coverage spec written in task notes or docs
- Used as test checklist for Dockerfile extractor implementation
","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:21:41.042914762-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T08:57:04.577103859-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-16T08:57:04.577103859-05:00","close_reason":"Completed Dockerfile extractor v1 syntax coverage spec document at docs/scan/dockerfile-extractor-v1-spec.md. Covers: file detection patterns, supported RUN forms (shell/exec/continuation), quoting and escape handling, explicitly unsupported constructs (heredocs, variable expansion, SHELL instruction), implementation limits, and comprehensive test checklist.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.1","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:21:41.044217394-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}
 {"id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.2","title":"[Scan] Makefile extractor v1 syntax coverage","description":"# Task: Makefile extractor v1 syntax coverage

## Purpose
Define the first-pass syntax coverage for Makefile extraction so scope is explicit
and testable (recipe lines, tabs, line continuations, simple variables).

## Requirements
- Define supported recipe formats
- Handling for line continuations (`\\`)
- Basic variable substitution rules (if any) for v1
- Explicitly list out-of-scope constructs

## Acceptance Criteria
- Coverage spec written and used as test checklist
","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:21:45.700033896-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T08:59:15.291374538-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-16T08:59:15.291374538-05:00","close_reason":"Completed Makefile extractor v1 syntax coverage spec document at docs/scan/makefile-extractor-v1-spec.md. Covers: file detection patterns, supported recipe formats (TAB-prefixed lines), backslash continuation handling, shell comment handling via shell extractor delegation, variable handling rules (no expansion in v1), explicitly unsupported constructs (variable expansion, make functions, conditionals, pattern rules, include directives), implementation details, and comprehensive test checklist.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.2","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:21:45.701351547-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}
 {"id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.3","title":"[Scan] GitHub Actions extractor v1 syntax coverage","description":"# Task: GitHub Actions extractor v1 syntax coverage

## Purpose
Define the first-pass syntax coverage for GitHub Actions workflows so extraction
is deterministic and testable.

## Requirements
- Cover `run:` blocks (single-line and multiline)
- Note handling for `shell:` overrides
- Define behavior for reusable workflows and composite actions (v1 expectations)

## Acceptance Criteria
- Coverage spec written and used as test checklist
","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:21:52.103717262-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T09:03:23.359380479-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-16T09:03:23.359380479-05:00","close_reason":"Completed GitHub Actions extractor v1 syntax coverage spec document at docs/scan/github-actions-extractor-v1-spec.md. Covers: file detection patterns (.github/workflows/*.yml|yaml), supported run block forms (single-line, literal block, folded block), quoted scalar handling, context-aware extraction (steps arrays only), skipped blocks (env/with/secrets), shell override handling (v1 limitation - shell agnostic), explicitly unsupported constructs (reusable workflows, composite actions, expression substitution, matrix strategies), and comprehensive test checklist.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.3","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:21:52.105050572-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}
-{"id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.4","title":"[Scan] Edge-case fixtures + fuzz tests for extractors","description":"# Task: Edge-case fixtures + fuzz tests for extractors

## Purpose
Ensure extractors handle tricky syntax (multiline, continuations, quoting) and
fail safely when unsure.

## Requirements
- Fixtures for multiline RUN, Makefile line continuations, and GHA multiline `run:`
- Quoting/escape edge cases
- Ensure extractors do not emit false positives on comments/data-only lines

## Acceptance Criteria
- Each extractor has multiple fixture cases (not just one integration test)
- Edge cases are covered with explicit expected output
","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:21:58.538144116-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T00:21:58.538144116-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.4","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:21:58.540231145-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}
+{"id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.4","title":"[Scan] Edge-case fixtures + fuzz tests for extractors","description":"# Task: Edge-case fixtures + fuzz tests for extractors

## Purpose
Ensure extractors handle tricky syntax (multiline, continuations, quoting) and
fail safely when unsure.

## Requirements
- Fixtures for multiline RUN, Makefile line continuations, and GHA multiline `run:`
- Quoting/escape edge cases
- Ensure extractors do not emit false positives on comments/data-only lines

## Acceptance Criteria
- Each extractor has multiple fixture cases (not just one integration test)
- Edge cases are covered with explicit expected output
","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:21:58.538144116-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T12:54:27.229198618-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.4","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:21:58.540231145-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}
 {"id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.5","title":"[Scan] E2E scan extractor suite + verbose logs","description":"# Task: E2E scan extractor suite + verbose logs

## Purpose
Validate scan-mode extractors end-to-end across Dockerfile/Makefile/GHA with
explicit, verbose logs when failures occur.

## Requirements
- Extend `scripts/e2e_test.sh` or add a dedicated scan E2E script
- Include multiple fixtures per format (happy path + edge cases)
- Log full scan output on failure (stderr + JSON/markdown)

## Acceptance Criteria
- E2E tests cover all extractors and format variants
- Failures provide actionable logs
","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:29:15.575762467-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T00:29:15.575762467-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.5","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:29:15.577687051-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.5","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-l9ig","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:29:19.944067327-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.5","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:29:22.847523006-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}
 {"id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.6","title":"[Scan] Unit tests for Dockerfile extractor","description":"# Task: Unit tests for Dockerfile extractor

## Purpose
Verify Dockerfile extractor behavior on supported syntax with deterministic unit tests.

## Requirements
- Use fixtures from Dockerfile coverage spec + edge-case fixtures
- Validate extracted commands and line/column metadata
- Assert no extraction for unsupported constructs

## Acceptance Criteria
- Unit tests cover single-line and multiline RUN
- Clear failure diagnostics with full extracted output
","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:38:19.358085552-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T00:38:19.358085552-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.6","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:38:19.359202946-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.6","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-0fv0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:38:33.892536326-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.6","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:38:37.764996116-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.6","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:38:42.191720115-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}
 {"id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.7","title":"[Scan] Unit tests for Makefile extractor","description":"# Task: Unit tests for Makefile extractor

## Purpose
Verify Makefile extractor behavior on supported syntax with deterministic unit tests.

## Requirements
- Use fixtures from Makefile coverage spec + edge-case fixtures
- Validate extracted commands, line numbers, and recipe handling
- Assert no extraction for unsupported constructs

## Acceptance Criteria
- Unit tests cover tabs, continuations, and comments
- Clear failure diagnostics
","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:38:24.271913623-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-16T00:38:24.271913623-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.7","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:38:24.273274576-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.7","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-dclh","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:38:46.492914681-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.7","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:38:49.810210248-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"},{"issue_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.7","depends_on_id":"git_safety_guard-5rbb.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-16T00:38:52.864723404-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone"}]}
